title: marah macrocarpa var. micrantha
intro: Marah macrocarpa var. micrantha, also known as the small-clustered manzanita or Manzanita, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cucumber family (Cucurbitaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high levels of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Marah macrocarpa var. micrantha include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues.
